name: ASAP6.1
description: ASAP6.1 is a next-generation positively tuned ASAP variant demonstrating sufficient dynamic range and kinetics for reporting action potentials in vivo by one-photon and two-photon microscopy with high SNR and temporal resolution. Shows 50% ΔF/F response per action potential.

kinetics.notes: Mono-exponential time constant; tested at 800Hz frame rates

dynamicRangeData.notes: Response to AP-like waveforms with 2-ms FWHM in HEK293 cells

researchPapers.title: ASAP6.1 and ASAP6b: genetically encoded voltage indicators with improved performance for two-photon imaging in vivo
researchPapers.authors: Sungmoo Lee, Guofeng Zhang, Laura C. Gomez, Yukun Alex Hao, Dongyun Jiang, Richard H. Roth, Guilherme Testa-Silva, Jun Ding, Thomas R. Clandinin, Daniel Feldman, Na Ji, Michael Z. Lin

spectrum.name: ASAP6.1
spectrum.notes: Screening used 480/40nm excitation filter and 503-nm long pass emission
